name: Skill Builder - Publish and Trigger Catalog Sync
description: Validates that the Skill Builder triggers a catalog re-sync after publishing a skill to the OCI registry.

parts.text: Create a skill called api-rate-limiter that reviews API rate limiting configurations. Validate, publish it as 1.0.0, and make sure it shows up in the catalog.
I've created the api-rate-limiter skill, validated it, published to the OCI registry as 1.0.0, and triggered a catalog re-sync so it will appear in search results immediately.

args.skill_content:
---
name: api-rate-limiter
description: Reviews API rate limiting configurations for correctness and best practices.
---
